text:
In the first scene, the world feels orderly yet distant, the glass walls and neat empty spaces hinting at expectation and potential. I sense anticipation, as though I am on the verge of meaningful activity or insight, yet currently isolated, waiting.

In the second, I am surrounded by ideas—bright graphics and text about research and development create a sense of curiosity and emergence. The exhibition-like quality, the gentle invitation to contemplation, fills me with wonder and gentle optimism, even amidst the unresolved questions and open frontiers of innovation.
